summary: Iteration 243 - Audit Log Enhancement Testing Complete. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. The extended audit log system covers new modules with commessa_id, actor_type fields, before/after tracking, and actor type filter.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/activity-log/stats: Returns actor_labels (3 options), entity_types (24), action_types (17) as expected
GET /api/activity-log: Returns entries with commessa_id and actor_type fields correctly
GET /api/activity-log?actor_type=system: Filter works correctly, returns only system entries
GET /api/activity-log?entity_type=obbligo: Filter works correctly, returns only obbligo entries
POST /api/obblighi/sync/{commessa_id}: Creates audit entry with action=sync_complete, actor_type=system, commessa_id set
PATCH /api/obblighi/{id}: Status change creates audit entry with before/after details in format {status: {before: 'old', after: 'new'}}
Frontend ActivityLogPage.js: 7-column table with 'Attore' column showing S/AI badges for non-user actors
Frontend: 6 filter columns including actor type dropdown with 3 options (Utente, Sistema, AI)
Frontend: Before/after details displayed with arrow notation (e.g., 'status: nuovo → in_corso')
Frontend: New entity types (Cantiere Sicurezza, Obbligo Commessa, etc.) and action types (Sync completato, Pre-compilazione AI, etc.) in dropdowns

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components render correctly, filters work, badges display)

seed_data_creation: Used existing user data with session_token K6fH_AIOSlUNVh8nGj5yAOjYtEyW-Ifsc4X5SFRVQYQ (user_97c773827822). Created new audit entries via POST /api/obblighi/sync and PATCH /api/obblighi for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit Log Enhancement is fully functional. The activity log page at /registro-attivita shows 173 total entries. New fields (commessa_id, actor_type) are present in entries. Actor type filter works with 3 options. Before/after tracking works for status changes. 24 entity types and 17 action types available in dropdowns.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/activity-log: PASSED - Returns entries with commessa_id and actor_type fields
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/activity-log?actor_type=system: PASSED - Filters correctly, returns only system entries
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/activity-log?entity_type=obblig: PASSED - Filters correctly, returns only obbligo entries
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/obblighi/sync/{commessa_id}: PASSED - Creates audit entry with action=sync_complete, actor_type=system
api_endpoints_tested.PATCH /api/obblighi/{id}: PASSED - Status change creates audit entry with before/after details

frontend_components_tested.Stats cards: PASSED - Shows 4 KPI cards (Oggi, Ultima settimana, Totale registri, Utenti attivi)
frontend_components_tested.Filter section: PASSED - 6 filter columns visible (Search, Entity type, Action, Actor type, Date from, Date to)
frontend_components_tested.Actor type filter: PASSED - Dropdown has 3 options (Utente, Sistema, AI)
frontend_components_tested.Entity type filter: PASSED - Dropdown shows new types (Cantiere Sicurezza, Obbligo Commessa, etc.)
frontend_components_tested.Action type filter: PASSED - Dropdown shows new actions (Sync completato, Pre-compilazione AI, etc.)
frontend_components_tested.S/AI badges: PASSED - System entries show 'S' badge in Attore column
frontend_components_tested.Before/after details: PASSED - Shows arrow notation (e.g., 'status: nuovo → in_corso')
frontend_components_tested.Pagination: PASSED - Shows 30 rows per page with navigation

features_verified.commessa_id field: Present in audit entries, filterable via query param
features_verified.actor_type field: Present in audit entries with values: user, system, ai
features_verified.actor_type filter: Frontend dropdown with 3 options, backend filter works
features_verified.before/after tracking: Status changes logged with {before: 'old', after: 'new'} format
features_verified.new entity types (24): cantiere_sicurezza, obbligo, pacchetto_documentale, documento_archivio, committenza_package, committenza_analisi, emissione, ramo_normativo added
features_verified.new action types (17): ai_precompile, generate_docx, sync_complete, verifica, approve, reject, gate_check, send_email, issue_document, genera_obblighi added
features_verified.Italian labels: All labels in Italian (Utente, Sistema, AI, Sync completato, etc.)
